name: Recruiter: select Morsoft contract (contract-chooser)
description: Force the /talent/contract-chooser and pick the Morsoft SRL-Recruiter (Empresa) contract so the Recruiter surface is usable (NOT the individual Job Posting one). Selecting it sticks for the daemon's persistent seat. NOT in registry. Selector verified live: button[data-live-test-contract-select='Morsoft SRL-Recruiter'].
